{{Expand}}

{{Infobox group
| name = Blackflame Underlords
| introduced = Underlord
}}

== Underlord ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|[[Blackflame Underlords]] are approaching.<ref name="cradle-06-underlord-c11">''Underlord'', chapter 11</ref>}}

== Wintersteel ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|Two of the eight [[Uncrowned]] are destined to be [[Blackflame Underlords]].<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c4">''Wintersteel'', chapter 4</ref>}}

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Cradle nav}}

[[Category:Groups]]
[[Category:Underlord]]
[[Category:Wintersteel]]
[[Category:Cradle]]
[[Category:Cradle groups]]
